elevenlabs_post_call_webhook.elevenlabs_workspace_webhook_secret_env: ELEVENLABS_POST_CALL_WEBHOOK_SECRET — saved separately in ~/.agents/.env, not in repo
elevenlabs_post_call_webhook.manual_followup: HMAC verify is DEFERRED in v1 — n8n's Code node sandbox does not expose 'crypto', so the HMAC-SHA256 step cannot run inline. The repo template JSON and the live workflow both run an accept-and-log Code node that captures every payload in n8n's execution log. To upgrade to real verification, insert an n8n-nodes-base.crypto node (type=HMAC, algorithm=SHA256, secret=$env.ELEVENLABS_POST_CALL_WEBHOOK_SECRET) before the Code node and compare against the header's v0 component via an IF node. Smoke test passes today (execution 25748 returned status=ok, payload parsed).

elevenlabs_monitoring_webhook.note: Workflow live but cannot be wired to agents: conversation.monitoring_enabled is ENTERPRISE-ONLY on this workspace. Listener stays online for when the tier upgrades.
